nasb.text: to fulfill the word of Jesus which He spoke, signifying by what kind of death He was about to die.

esv.text: This was to fulfill the word that Jesus had spoken to show by what kind of death he was going to die.

cnv.text: 這就應驗了耶穌預先說到自己將要怎樣死的那句話。

ccb.text: 这是要应验耶稣预言自己会怎样死的话。

csbs.text: 这是为要应验耶稣说过的话，就是他指明自己将要怎样死的那些话。
